description: Replace fuser crate on macOS with direct FFI to libfuse-t C API. fuser bypasses libfuse session loop and reads the FUSE fd directly, incompatible with FUSE-T NFS-based socket protocol. Use libfuse3 high-level API via hand-written FFI on macOS, keep fuser for Linux.
title: macOS FUSE-T direct backend - bypass fuser
